max_holloway.name: Max Holloway
max_holloway.physical_notes: Moved up to Lightweight, natural frame better suited for 145. Less stopping power at 155 but better cardio.

charles_oliveira.name: Charles Oliveira
charles_oliveira.power_rating: High - maintained submission threat, improved striking power
charles_oliveira.physical_notes: Filled out frame at 155, much more successful than at 145. Natural Lightweight with excellent strength.

caio_borralho.name: Caio Borralho
caio_borralho.power_rating: Moderate - volume striker, not a one-punch KO artist
caio_borralho.physical_notes: Tall Middleweight, uses range well. Cardio machine with consistent output over 3 rounds.

reinier_de_ridder.name: Reinier de Ridder

ko_rate_by_weight_class.205: 50% (1 of 2 wins by KO/TKO in UFC)

reinier_de_ridder.power_rating: Low at 185 - grappling focused, gassed in fights
reinier_de_ridder.physical_notes: Tall but struggled with weight cut to 185. Better suited for 205 where he had more success. Announced move back to 205 after UFC 326.

rob_font.name: Rob Font
rob_font.power_rating: High - best boxing in Bantamweight division
rob_font.physical_notes: Excellent reach for height. Heavy hands, technical striker. Vulnerable to takedowns (TD Def gap identified).

raul_rosas_jr.name: Raul Rosas Jr.
raul_rosas_jr.physical_notes: Still physically maturing. Good reach for division. High pace grappler. TD Def gap identified.

long_xiao.name: Long Xiao
long_xiao.physical_notes: Average size for Bantamweight. Strong grappling base from Chinese martial arts background. 9 submission wins.

key_physical_insights.holloway_at_155: Lost KO power moving up, but maintained volume and cardio advantage
key_physical_insights.oliveira_natural_size: Big Lightweight, strength advantage over Holloway
key_physical_insights.de_ridder_weight_cut: 185 lb cut likely impacted cardio and performance
key_physical_insights.rosas_development: Still growing into body at 20 years old

td_def_gaps_filled.rob_font: Data still needed - estimated 60-65% based on fight footage
td_def_gaps_filled.raul_rosas_jr: Data still needed - estimated 55-60% based on grappling exchanges
td_def_gaps_filled.caio_borralho: Data still needed - estimated 70-75% based on takedown avoidance
td_def_gaps_filled.reinier_de_ridder: Data still needed - estimated 60% based on wrestling struggles at 185
td_def_gaps_filled.max_holloway: Data still needed - estimated 80%+ based on historical performance
td_def_gaps_filled.charles_oliveira: Data still needed - estimated 60% based on wrestling vulnerabilities
